walkthrough_goal: Verify that the latest static preview still supports first-pass operator reading, evidence recovery and preserved behavior from v4 through v16 without any real execution surface.

actions: Open the latest preview and stay on the default landing surface.
Confirm the primary daily read is visible before expanding any disclosure.
Open and close at least one evidence disclosure.
pass_conditions: Primary signal is visible without scrolling into buried explanation.
Evidence remains reachable after disclosure-heavy simplification.
No runtime or external execution language appears.

actions: Enter Agenda in day mode.
Review the selected-day timeline and summary.
Confirm the day view reads as the operational decision surface.
pass_conditions: Day timeline remains legible.
The day summary is not duplicated as a fake weekly grid.
v6 Rafael reflection remains visible when applicable.

actions: Switch from day mode to week mode.
Scan all seven cards before returning to any day.
pass_conditions: The semantic split between Dia and Semana remains clear.
Weekly cadence can be scanned quickly.
v13 compact control intent remains intact.

actions: Open Atendimento.
Review at least one conversation card and its details disclosure.
pass_conditions: Conversations still read as manual triage, not automation.
Open items remain understandable as pending operator judgment.

actions: Open Disponibilidade.
Exercise the focused-day mobile navigation path.
pass_conditions: Focused-day navigation remains usable on narrow widths.
No horizontal overflow appears.
Synthetic blocks remain legible and local-only.

actions: Open Aprovacoes.
Review at least one exception card and its supporting context.
pass_conditions: Approval review remains clearly human-in-the-loop.
Context and impact are available without implying live authorization.

actions: Open Estimativa do dia.
Compare the lost-value explanation against Hoje.
pass_conditions: Predicted, confirmed, recoverable and lost values remain internally coherent.
Hoje and Estimativa still agree on lost value exactly.

actions: Open Configuracoes.
Switch theme and scenario locally.
pass_conditions: Dark and light themes both preserve the control system.
Theme persistence remains tied to aris_benchuix_theme.
Scenario switching stays local to the draft.

actions: Open Ajuda.
Exercise search, category filter and FAQ expansion.
pass_conditions: Help search and filter still return local procedural guidance.
FAQ collapse/expand still works without external dependency.

global_pass_conditions: Latest preview opens successfully in a local headless browser run.
No horizontal overflow at 320, 375, 480, 768 and 1024 widths.
No forbidden integration strings in the preview source.
